title: potentilla montenegrina
intro: Potentilla montenegrina, also known as Montenegrin cinquefoil, is a flowering plant species in the rose family (Rosaceae) native to the Balkan Peninsula. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Potentilla montenegrina are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Potentilla montenegrina include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and ointments for topical application.
